data.title: A whale withdrew 1,444 cbBTC from Coinbase in the past two weeks, deposited it into Aave, borrowed 29,025 ETH, and then deposited it into Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain analyst Ember’s monitoring, although the ETH/BTC exchange rate has fallen to 0.028, there are still whales that are looking down on the ETH/BTC exchange rate: a whale has withdrawn a total of 1,444 cbBTC (US$138.14 million) from Coinbase in the past two weeks, and then deposited it into Aave as collateral to borrow 29,025 ETH (US$77.6 million) and then transferred it to Coinbase.

data.title: Trump: I can't find anyone smarter than Musk
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Musk said in an interview today: "If the bureaucracy is against the will of the people, then we live in a bureaucracy, not a democracy." He also showed himself wearing clothes with the words "Technical Support" printed on them by the White House.
Trump said: "Musk hired some very smart young people at DOGE, and they are actually dressed worse than him. They only wear T-shirts. You can't tell that their IQ is 180."
In addition, Trump praised Musk for saving thousands of lives through Starlink, and started to brag about business at the same time: "I want to find someone smarter than Musk. I looked everywhere, but I just can't find it."

data.title: Ordinals Inscription Minting Cumulative Fee Income Exceeds 7,000 BTC
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Dune data shows that the total amount of Ordinals inscriptions cast by the current Bitcoin NFT protocol has exceeded 79 million, reaching 79,023,290. The cumulative fee income of Ordinals inscription casting has exceeded 7,000 BTC, reaching 7,000.1581 BTC, with a value of approximately US$673,214,522.

data.title: Meme coin controversy causes Solana narrative to collapse, traders focus on potential reversal of SOL/ETH exchange rate
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Cryptocurrency traders are watching for a potential reversal in the SOL/ETH exchange rate as a series of Meme coin scandals affect investor sentiment towards the Solana network.
According to TradingView data, SOL has significantly outperformed ETH since mid-2023, during which time the SOL/ETH exchange rate has risen more than tenfold. The SOL/ETH exchange rate reversed after reaching a peak of 0.08 on February 15, falling to around 0.06 on February 18.
Andy Yu, co-founder of venture capital firm Rollup Ventures, wrote in an article on X: "Solana's narrative as the best retail participation chain has just turned into one associated with scams and insider trading, which will take time to correct." At the same time, "Ethereum is ready for mainstream adoption. The tide is turning," adding that the SOL/ETH exchange rate is a barometer of shifting market sentiment. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Musk "confessed" Trump: I love this president, he is a good man
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk said in an interview today: "I love the president. I just want to be clear about that. I think President Trump is a good man."

data.title: New Zealand Reserve Bank President Orr: It is generally appropriate to cut interest rates in April and May
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: New Zealand Reserve Bank Chairman Orr said that it is basically appropriate to cut interest rates in April and May. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bithumb will list Gnosis (GNO) Korean Won trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bithumb will launch the Gnosis (GNO) Korean won trading pair today.

data.title: Affected by the news of Bithumb's listing, GNO rose by more than 15% in a short period of time, breaking through 286 USDT and then falling back
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that affected by the news that Bithumb will launch GNO Korean won trading, market data showed that GNO rose in the short term and broke through 286 USDT before falling back, temporarily reporting 200.2 USDT, with a short-term increase of more than 15%.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Drop Leads To Significant Liquidation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 19, monitoring by PeckShield revealed that after Bitcoin fell below $94,000 in the early hours, an address (0xceef...ba42) was liquidated for approximately 150 WBTC, valued at around $14 million.

data.title: Hong Kong to Advance AI and Cryptocurrency Development
data.description: According to Foresight News, at the Consensus Hong Kong 2025 conference, Hong Kong's Financial Secretary, Paul Chan, emphasized the potential of decentralized AI in creating numerous opportunities. He stated that Hong Kong is committed to advancing AI in the financial sector. Digital and blockchain innovations are enhancing market transparency, with many institutions leveraging these technologies to improve their services. Chan highlighted that innovation and regulatory advancements are progressing in tandem. As digitalization accelerates, there is a need to strengthen regulatory measures. Additionally, Hong Kong plans to further develop the cryptocurrency market and introduce supportive policies for the crypto industry. To date, Hong Kong has issued nine virtual asset trading licenses and intends to issue more, along with enacting additional legislation to foster industry growth.
